inline_comments.message:
You can make this a primitive boolean instead of object

Let's make this configurable, so we can test new interface in labs.   Do this:

Add an entry here in the aai.group:

./controlloop/common/feature-controlloop-management/src/main/feature/config/controlloop.properties.environment

aai.customQuery=false

In your code read it with

PolicyEngine.manager.getEnvironmentProperty("aai.customQuery").

That way we can play with it in lab as we wish.
